marquis_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of opiates and amphetamines

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add three drops of water and smear the sample against the spot plate with a glass rod or spatula.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف ثلاث قطرات من الماء وامسح العينة على لوحة البقع باستخدام قضيب زجاجي أو ملعقة.

testInstructions.instruction: Transfer a drop of the liquid to another depression of the spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: انقل قطرة من السائل إلى انخفاض آخر في لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent 1A (Add 8-10 drops of 37% formaldehyde solution to 10 ml of glacial acetic acid).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 1A (أضف 8-10 قطرات من محلول الفورمالديهايد 37% إلى 10 مل من حمض الأسيتيك الجليدي).

testInstructions.instruction: Add three drops of reagent 1B (Concentrated sulfuric acid).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف ثلاث قطرات من الكاشف 1B (حمض الكبريتيك المركز).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Auterhoff, H., Braun, D.. Arch.Pharm.(Weinheim), 306 (1973) 866

handlingProcedures: Always work in a well-ventilated area or fume hood.
Add reagents one drop at a time.
Never mix reagents directly — apply separately to sample.
Neutralise spills immediately with sodium bicarbonate solution.
specificHazards: Concentrated sulfuric acid causes severe chemical burns.
Formaldehyde is a known carcinogen — minimise inhalation.
Violent reaction possible if reagents contact water suddenly.
storageRequirements: Store in a cool, dark location away from bases.
Keep containers tightly sealed when not in use.
Separate from flammable materials.

mecke_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of morphine and codeine

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent 3 (Dissolve 1 g of selenious acid in 100 ml of concentrated sulfuric acid).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 3 (اذب 1 غرام من حمض السيلينيوس في 100 مل من حمض الكبريتيك المركز).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Rehse, K.. Arch.Pharm.(Weinheim), 302 (1969) 487

Kovar, K.-A., Laudszun, M.. Chemistry and Reaction Mechanisms of Rapid Tests for Drugs of Abuse and Precursor Chemicals. United Nations - Scientific and Technical Notes, SCITEC/6, Vienna (1989), p. 16

handlingProcedures: Work in a ventilated area at all times.
Avoid skin and eye contact with selenious acid.
Use ceramic or glass spot plates only.
specificHazards: Selenious acid is highly toxic if ingested or inhaled.
Concentrated sulfuric acid is severely corrosive.
May produce toxic selenium dioxide fumes.
storageRequirements: Store separately from reducing agents.
Keep in original labelled containers.
Dispose of waste via approved hazardous chemical channels.

ferric_sulfate_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of cocaine and cannabis

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add three drops of water and smear the sample against the spot plate with a glass rod or spatula.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف ثلاث قطرات من الماء وامسح العينة على لوحة البقع باستخدام قضيب زجاجي أو ملعقة.

testInstructions.instruction: Transfer a drop of the liquid to another depression of the spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: انقل قطرة من السائل إلى انخفاض آخر في لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent 2 (Dissolve 5 g of ferric sulfate in 100 ml of water).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 2 (اذب 5 غرامات من كبريتات الحديد في 100 مل من الماء).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Hartke, K., Mutschler, E. (Editors). DAB 9 - Kommentar. Wissenschaftliche Verlagsgesellschaft, Stuttgart (1987), p. 2603

handlingProcedures: Prepare reagent solution under a fume hood.
Use a glass rod — do not use metal implements.
Avoid ingestion; wash hands after use.
specificHazards: Ferric sulfate is an irritant to skin and eyes.
Solution is slightly acidic — avoid prolonged skin contact.
storageRequirements: Store in a cool, dry location.
Keep away from reducing agents and alkalis.

nitric_acid_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of heroin and morphine

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent 4 (Concentrated nitric acid).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 4 (حمض النيتريك المركز).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change immediately.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون فورًا.

references: Ditzel, P., Kovar, K.-A.. Rausch- und Suchtmittel. Deutscher Apotheker Verlag, Stuttgart (1983)
Kovar, K.-A., Noy, M., Pieper, R.. Dtsch.Apoth.Ztg., 122 (1982) 3

handlingProcedures: ONLY handle inside a fume hood.
Never add water to acid — always add acid to water.
Have a neutralising agent (sodium bicarbonate) ready at all times.
Use minimal amounts of concentrated nitric acid.
specificHazards: Concentrated nitric acid causes severe chemical burns.
Produces toxic nitrogen dioxide (NO₂) gas.
May react violently with organic materials causing fire.
storageRequirements: Store in a dedicated acid cabinet with ventilation.
Keep away from combustible and reducing materials.
Never store in a refrigerator with other chemicals.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add a small amount of reagent 5A (Carefully mix 2.5 g of fast blue B salt with 100 g of anhydrous sodium sulfate).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف كمية صغيرة من الكاشف 5A (امزج بعناية 2.5 غرام من ملح الفاست بلو بي مع 100 غرام من كبريتات الصوديوم اللامائية).

testInstructions.instruction: Add 25 drops of reagent 5B (Chloroform) and shake the test tube for one minute.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف 25 قطرة من الكاشف 5B (الكلوروفورم) واهز أنبوب الاختبار لمدة دقيقة واحدة.

testInstructions.instruction: Add 25 drops of reagent 5C (Dissolve 0.4 g of sodium hydroxide in 100 ml of water = 0.1N sodium hydroxide solution) and shake for two minutes.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف 25 قطرة من الكاشف 5C (اذب 0.4 غرام من هيدروكسيد الصوديوم في 100 مل من الماء = محلول هيدروكسيد الصوديوم 0.1N) واهز لمدة دقيقتين.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe color changes and record results.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغيرات اللون وسجل النتائج.

references: Ditzel, P., Kovar, K.-A.. Rausch- und Suchtmittel. Deutscher Apotheker Verlag, Stuttgart (1983)

handlingProcedures: Handle chloroform only in a fume hood.
Avoid breathing chloroform vapours.
Mix Fast Blue B salt in a dry environment.
specificHazards: Chloroform is a suspected carcinogen and CNS depressant.
Fast Blue B Salt is toxic by skin absorption and inhalation.
Sodium hydroxide solution is caustic.
storageRequirements: Store chloroform in a sealed container away from light.
Keep Fast Blue B Salt desiccated and sealed.
Separate from oxidisers.

duquenois_levine_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of cannabis and derivatives

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add 2 ml (approximately 50 drops) of reagent 6A (Dissolve 2 g of vanillin in 100 ml of 95% ethanol, then add 2.5 ml of acetaldehyde) and shake the test tube for one minute.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف 2 مل (حوالي 50 قطرة) من الكاشف 6A (اذب 2 غرام من الفانيلين في 100 مل من الإيثانول 95%، ثم أضف 2.5 مل من الأسيتالديهيد) واهز أنبوب الاختبار لمدة دقيقة واحدة.

testInstructions.instruction: Add 2 ml of reagent 6B (Concentrated hydrochloric acid), shake again for a few seconds and allow the mixture to stand for a few minutes.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف 2 مل من الكاشف 6B (حمض الهيدروكلوريك المركز)، اهز مرة أخرى لبضع ثوانٍ واترك الخليط ليستقر لبضع دقائق.

testInstructions.instruction: If a color develops within 2-3 minutes, add 2 ml of reagent 6C (Chloroform) and shake the mixture gently.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: إذا تطور لون خلال 2-3 دقائق، أضف 2 مل من الكاشف 6C (الكلوروفورم) واهز الخليط برفق.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the final color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون النهائي.

references: Kovar, K.-A., Keck, M., Krieger, Th.. Sci.Pharm., 56 (1988) 29

handlingProcedures: Avoid inhaling ethanol vapours.
Add hydrochloric acid carefully — it is fuming.
Chloroform must be handled in a fume hood.
specificHazards: Concentrated hydrochloric acid produces corrosive HCl fumes.
Chloroform is a suspected carcinogen.
Acetaldehyde is highly flammable.
storageRequirements: Store all components separately in a ventilated cabinet.
Keep away from ignition sources.
Chloroform: dark, cool location.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add approximately ten drops of reagent 9 (Dissolve 5 g of potassium hydroxide in 100 ml of absolute methanol).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف حوالي عشر قطرات من الكاشف 9 (اذب 5 غرامات من هيدروكسيد البوتاسيوم في 100 مل من الميثانول المطلق).

testInstructions.instruction: Shake the test tube for ten seconds.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: اهز أنبوب الاختبار لمدة عشر ثوانٍ.

testInstructions.instruction: Compare the smell with that of a reference methyl benzoate sample.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: قارن الرائحة مع عينة مرجعية من بنزوات الميثيل.

references: Kovar, K.-A., Noy, M., Pieper, R.. Dtsch.Apoth.Ztg., 122 (1982) 3

handlingProcedures: Prepare reagent in a well-ventilated area.
Avoid inhalation of cobalt thiocyanate dust.
Wash hands thoroughly after handling.
specificHazards: Cobalt compounds are suspected carcinogens.
Hydrochloric acid is corrosive and produces fumes.
Solution is an irritant to mucous membranes.
storageRequirements: Store in a dark, cool location.
Keep solutions in sealed glass containers.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add five drops of reagent 8A (Dissolve 1 g of cobalt(II) thiocyanate in 50 ml of 10% acetic acid, then add 50 ml of glycerine) and shake the test tube for ten seconds.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف خمس قطرات من الكاشف 8A (اذب 1 غرام من ثيوسيانات الكوبالت(II) في 50 مل من حمض الأسيتيك 10%، ثم أضف 50 مل من الجليسرين) واهز أنبوب الاختبار لمدة عشر ثوانٍ.

testInstructions.instruction: If the solution turned blue in step 2, add one drop of reagent 8B (Concentrated hydrochloric acid) and shake the mixture for a few seconds.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: إذا أصبح المحلول أزرق في الخطوة 2، أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 8B (حمض الهيدروكلوريك المركز) واهز الخليط لبضع ثوانٍ.

testInstructions.instruction: If the solution turns completely pink in step 3, add five drops of reagent 8C (Chloroform) and shake again to mix the liquids.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: إذا أصبح المحلول ورديًا بالكامل في الخطوة 3، أضف خمس قطرات من الكاشف 8C (الكلوروفورم) واهز مرة أخرى لخلط السوائل.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color changes: Blue → Pink → Blue (chloroform layer indicates cocaine presence).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغيرات اللون: أزرق → وردي → أزرق (طبقة الكلوروفورم تشير إلى وجود الكوكايين).

references: Kovar, K.-A., Laudszun, M.. Chemistry and Reaction Mechanisms of Rapid Tests for Drugs of Abuse and Precursor Chemicals. United Nations - Scientific and Technical Notes, SCITEC/6, Vienna (1989), p. 15

handlingProcedures: Add hydrochloric acid one drop at a time.
Handle chloroform in a fume hood only.
Observe colour changes promptly and record.
specificHazards: Chloroform is a suspected carcinogen.
Cobalt compounds pose a long-term health risk.
Hydrochloric acid fumes are corrosive to the respiratory tract.
storageRequirements: Store chloroform separately from hydrochloric acid.
All components in a ventilated, secure cabinet.

methyl_benzoate_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of cocaine by odor comparison
methyl_benzoate_test.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ الكوكايين عبر مقارنة الرائحة

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add approximately ten drops of reagent 9 (Dissolve 5 g of potassium hydroxide in 100 ml of absolute methanol).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف حوالي عشر قطرات من الكاشف 9 (اذب 5 غرامات من هيدروكسيد البوتاسيوم في 100 مل من الميثانول المطلق).

testInstructions.instruction: Shake the test tube for ten seconds.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: اهز أنبوب الاختبار لمدة عشر ثوانٍ.

testInstructions.instruction: Compare the smell with that of a reference methyl benzoate sample.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: قارن الرائحة مع عينة مرجعية من بنزوات الميثيل.

references: Grant, f.W., Martin, W.C., Quackenbush, R.W.. Bull.Narc., No.2 (1975) 33
Grant, F.W., Martin, W.C., Quackenbush, R.W.. Bull.Narc., No.2 (1975) 33

handlingProcedures: Carry out test in a fume hood.
Avoid ingesting potassium hydroxide solution.
Shake gently — avoid aerosol formation.
specificHazards: Potassium hydroxide is highly caustic.
Methanol is toxic by ingestion and inhalation.
Methyl benzoate vapours may cause headaches.
storageRequirements: Store potassium hydroxide away from moisture.
Keep methanol in a flammables cabinet.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add five drops of water and shake the test tube for a few seconds.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف خمس قطرات من الماء واهز أنبوب الاختبار لبضع ثوانٍ.

testInstructions.instruction: Add two drops of reagent 10 (Mix 1.27 g of iodine and 2 g of potassium iodide, then dissolve the mixture in 100 ml of water).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرتين من الكاشف 10 (امزج 1.27 غرام من اليود و2 غرام من يوديد البوتاسيوم، ثم اذب الخليط في 100 مل من الماء).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Jungreis, E.. Spot Test Analysis - Clinical, Environmental, Forensic and Geochemical Applications. John Wiley & Sons, Inc., New York (1985), p. 77

handlingProcedures: Handle iodine solution with care — it stains.
Avoid skin contact with potassium iodide solution.
Dispose of iodine-containing waste properly.
specificHazards: Iodine vapours are irritating to the respiratory tract.
Solution will stain skin and surfaces permanently.
storageRequirements: Store iodine solution in a dark glass bottle.
Keep away from reducing agents.

simon_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of MDMA and methamphetamine
simon_test.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ إم دي إم إيه والميثامفيتامين

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent 12A (Dissolve 0.9 g of sodium nitroprusside in 90 ml of water, then add 10 ml of acetaldehyde).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 12A (اذب 0.9 غرام من نيتروبروسيد الصوديوم في 90 مل من الماء، ثم أضف 10 مل من الأسيتالديهيد).

testInstructions.instruction: Add two drops of reagent 12B (Dissolve 2 g of sodium carbonate in 100 ml of water).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرتين من الكاشف 12B (اذب 2 غرام من كربونات الصوديوم في 100 مل من الماء).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Wiegrebe, W., Vilbig, M.. Ztg.Naturforsch., 36b (1981) 1297

handlingProcedures: Mix reagents on a spot plate — do not mix in bulk.
Keep acetaldehyde away from ignition sources.
Discard waste containing nitroprusside via approved channels.
specificHazards: Sodium nitroprusside decomposes to release cyanide when acidified.
Acetaldehyde is highly flammable.
Sodium carbonate is a mild irritant.
storageRequirements: Store nitroprusside solution in the dark and refrigerated.
Keep acetaldehyde in a sealed container in a flammables cabinet.

simon_test_with_acetone.description: For reagent-based analysis of amphetamine derivatives

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent 13A (Dissolve 0.9 g of sodium nitroprusside in 90 ml of water, then add 10 ml of acetone).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 13A (اذب 0.9 غرام من نيتروبروسيد الصوديوم في 90 مل من الماء، ثم أضف 10 مل من الأسيتون).

testInstructions.instruction: Add two drops of reagent 13B (Dissolve 2 g of sodium carbonate in 100 ml of water).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرتين من الكاشف 13B (اذب 2 غرام من كربونات الصوديوم في 100 مل من الماء).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Wiegrebe, W., Vilbig, M.. Ztg.Naturforsch., 37b (1982) 490

handlingProcedures: Keep acetone away from all ignition sources.
Work in a ventilated area.
Mix reagents fresh before use.
specificHazards: Acetone is highly flammable.
Sodium nitroprusside may release cyanide in acidic conditions.
storageRequirements: Store acetone in a flammables cabinet.
Keep nitroprusside solution refrigerated and away from light.

ehrlich_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of LSD and psilocybin
ehrlich_test.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ إل إس دي والسيلوسيبين

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add five drops of reagent 17 (Dissolve 1 g of p-dimethylaminobenzaldehyde in 10 ml of concentrated hydrochloric acid and 90 ml of absolute ethanol).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف خمس قطرات من الكاشف 17 (اذب 1 غرام من p-ثنائي ميثيل أمين بنزالديهيد في 10 مل من حمض الهيدروكلوريك المركز و90 مل من الإيثانول المطلق).

testInstructions.instruction: Shake the test tube for a few seconds and allow the mixture to stand for 10-15 minutes.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: اهز أنبوب الاختبار لبضع ثوانٍ واترك الخليط ليستقر لمدة 10-15 دقيقة.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Pindur, U.. Pharm.Unserer Zeit, 11 (1982) 74

handlingProcedures: Use concentrated hydrochloric acid only in a fume hood.
p-DMAB may cause skin sensitisation — minimise contact.
Allow the test to develop in an undisturbed area.
specificHazards: Concentrated hydrochloric acid is corrosive.
4-DMAB (p-dimethylaminobenzaldehyde) is an irritant.
Ethanol in reagent is a fire hazard.
storageRequirements: Store reagent in a dark glass bottle, refrigerated.
Keep away from heat and light.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent 19 (Dissolve 0.5 g of sodium nitrite in 100 ml of concentrated sulfuric acid).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 19 (اذب 0.5 غرام من نيتريت الصوديوم في 100 مل من حمض الكبريتيك المركز).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Moffat, A.C. (Editor). Clarke's Isolation and Identification of Drugs. The Pharmaceutical Press, London (1986), p. 208
Moffat, A.C. (Editor). Clarke's Isolation and Identification of Drugs, 2nd Edition. The Pharmaceutical Press, London (1986), p. 737, 867

handlingProcedures: Handle concentrated sulfuric acid with extreme care.
Never add large amounts of sodium nitrite at once.
Work in a fume hood at all times.
specificHazards: Concentrated sulfuric acid causes severe burns.
Sodium nitrite is oxidising and toxic.
Reaction may produce nitrogen oxides (NO₂).
storageRequirements: Store acid in a corrosive materials cabinet.
Keep sodium nitrite away from acids and combustibles.

mandelin_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of alkaloids and amphetamines

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent 20 (Dissolve 1 g of ammonium vanadate in 100 ml of concentrated sulfuric acid).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف 20 (اذب 1 غرام من فانادات الأمونيوم في 100 مل من حمض الكبريتيك المركز).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Moffat, A.C. (Editor). Clarke's Isolation and Identification of Drugs. The Pharmaceutical Press, London (1986), p. 208

handlingProcedures: Dissolve ammonium vanadate in acid VERY carefully.
Add acid to the solid in small portions.
Test on spot plate — never in bulk quantities.
specificHazards: Ammonium vanadate is toxic by inhalation and ingestion.
Concentrated sulfuric acid causes severe chemical burns.
May produce vanadium pentoxide dust — a respiratory hazard.
storageRequirements: Store vanadate in a sealed container in a ventilated cabinet.
Keep concentrated acid in a dedicated acid storage area.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the suspected material in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة المشتبه بها في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add five drops of reagent 21A (Dissolve 1 g of 2,4-dinitrochlorobenzene in 100 ml of methanol).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف خمس قطرات من الكاشف 21A (اذب 1 غرام من 2،4-ثنائي نيتروكلورو بنزين في 100 مل من الميثانول).

testInstructions.instruction: Add five drops of reagent 21B (Dissolve 5 g of potassium hydroxide in 100 ml of methanol).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف خمس قطرات من الكاشف 21B (اذب 5 غرامات من هيدروكسيد البوتاسيوم في 100 مل من الميثانول).

testInstructions.instruction: Shake the test tube for a few seconds and allow the mixture to stand for 2-3 minutes.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: اهز أنبوب الاختبار لبضع ثوانٍ واترك الخليط ليستقر لمدة 2-3 دقائق.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون.

references: Moffat, A.C. (Editor). Clarke's Isolation and Identification of Drugs. The Pharmaceutical Press, London (1986), p. 208

handlingProcedures: Handle 2,4-dinitrochlorobenzene with care — it is a skin sensitiser.
Prepare reagents in a fume hood.
Allow adequate development time before reading results.
specificHazards: 2,4-Dinitrochlorobenzene is a strong skin sensitiser and suspected carcinogen.
Potassium hydroxide in methanol is caustic.
Methanol is toxic by ingestion and inhalation.
storageRequirements: Store dinitrochlorobenzene in a tightly sealed container.
Keep methanol in a flammables cabinet.
Store KOH/methanol solution refrigerated in a dark bottle.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of reagent (Potassium dichromate in H2SO4).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من الكاشف (ثنائي كرومات البوتاسيوم في H2SO4).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe color change from orange to green.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون من البرتقالي إلى الأخضر.

references: Borkenstein, R. F.. The Breathalyzer and its Applications. Indiana University (1954)
Jones, A. W.. Measuring Alcohol in Blood and Breath for Forensic Purposes: A Historical Review. (2008)
Borkenstein, R. F.. Indiana University (1954)

handlingProcedures: Handle concentrated sulfuric acid with extreme care.
Add potassium dichromate to acid carefully — avoid dust inhalation.
Work in a fume hood.
specificHazards: Potassium dichromate is as toxic as it is oxidizing and is a suspected carcinogen.
Concentrated sulfuric acid causes severe chemical burns.
Reaction may release toxic chromium-containing aerosols.
storageRequirements: Store dichromate separately from combustible materials.
Keep acid in a dedicated acid cabinet.

chen_kao_test.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ القات / الكاثينون / الكاثين

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add two drops of 1% copper(II) sulfate solution.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرتين من محلول كبريتات النحاس (II) بنسبة 1%.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of 5% sodium hydroxide solution.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من محلول هيدروكسيد الصوديوم بنسبة 5%.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe color change (Violet for Cathinones).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون (بنفسجي للكاثينونات).

references: Hartke, K., Mutschler, E. (Editors). DAB 9 - Kommentar. Wissenschaftliche Verlagsgesellschaft, Stuttgart (1987), p. 1550

handlingProcedures: Avoid eye and skin contact with reagents.
Discard waste solutions according to local environmental regulations.
Prepare fresh solutions if possible.
specificHazards: Copper(II) sulfate is an irritant and harmful if swallowed.
Sodium hydroxide solution is caustic and can cause burns.
Methanol/Ethanol vapors are flammable.
storageRequirements: Keep sodium hydroxide in a tightly sealed container.
Store copper sulfate in a cool, dry location.

nitric_sulfuric_acid_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of methadone and related compounds
nitric_sulfuric_acid_test.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ الميثادون والمركبات ذات الصلة

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of concentrated sulfuric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض الكبريتيك المركز.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of concentrated nitric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض النيتريك المركز.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe color change immediately.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون فورًا.

references: Demonceau, J.. J.Pharm.Belg., 7 (1952) 36

handlingProcedures: ONLY handle inside a fume hood.
Never add water to acid — always add acid to water.
Have a neutralising agent (sodium bicarbonate) ready at all times.
specificHazards: Both nitric and sulfuric acids cause severe chemical burns.
Produces toxic nitrogen dioxide (NO₂) gas.
Reaction with sample may be highly exothermic.
storageRequirements: Store in a dedicated acid cabinet with ventilation.
Separate from flammable and reducing materials.

nitric_acid_test_heroin.description: For reagent-based analysis of heroin using nitric acid reagent
nitric_acid_test_heroin.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ الهيروين باستخدام كاشف حمض النيتريك

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of concentrated nitric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض النيتريك المركز.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change transition from yellow to light green.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ انتقال تغير اللون من الأصفر إلى الأخضر الفاتح.

references: Ditzel, P., Kovar, K.-A.. Rausch- und Suchtmittel. Deutscher Apotheker Verlag, Stuttgart (1983)
Kovar, K.-A., Noy, M., Pieper, R.. Dtsch.Apoth.Ztg., 122 (1982) 3

handlingProcedures: Use only in a well-ventilated fume hood.
Minimize the volume of concentrated acid used.
Clean up spills immediately with appropriate neutralizers.
specificHazards: Concentrated nitric acid causes severe burns.
Releases nitrogen dioxide gas, which is highly toxic when inhaled.
storageRequirements: Keep in a secure acid storage cabinet.
Keep away from organic materials.

nitric_acid_test_morphine.description: For reagent-based analysis of morphine using nitric acid reagent
nitric_acid_test_morphine.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ المورفين باستخدام كاشف حمض النيتريك

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of concentrated nitric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض النيتريك المركز.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the rapid sequence of color changes (Orange to Red to Yellow).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ التسلسل السريع لتغيرات اللون (برتقالي إلى أحمر إلى أصفر).

references: Ditzel, P., Kovar, K.-A.. Rausch- und Suchtmittel. Deutscher Apotheker Verlag, Stuttgart (1983)
Kovar, K.-A., Noy, M., Pieper, R.. Dtsch.Apoth.Ztg., 122 (1982) 3

handlingProcedures: Handle only within an operating fume hood.
Wear full protective gear.
Ensure spill cleanup kits are adjacent.
specificHazards: Severe corrosive nature of concentrated nitric acid.
Toxic gas emission during reactions.
storageRequirements: Store in a ventilated safety cabinet.
Avoid contact with combustible substances.

nitric_acid_test_codeine.description: For reagent-based analysis of codeine using nitric acid reagent
nitric_acid_test_codeine.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ الكودايين باستخدام كاشف حمض النيتريك

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of concentrated nitric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض النيتريك المركز.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change from orange to permanent yellow.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون من البرتقالي إلى الأصفر الدائم.

references: Ditzel, P., Kovar, K.-A.. Rausch- und Suchtmittel. Deutscher Apotheker Verlag, Stuttgart (1983)
Kovar, K.-A., Noy, M., Pieper, R.. Dtsch.Apoth.Ztg., 122 (1982) 3

handlingProcedures: Handle only within an operating fume hood.
Wear full protective gear.
Ensure spill cleanup kits are adjacent.
specificHazards: Severe corrosive nature of concentrated nitric acid.
Toxic gas emission during reactions.
storageRequirements: Store in a ventilated safety cabinet.
Avoid contact with combustible substances.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of sample in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add 2 drops of reagent 7A (Dissolve 0.1 g of cobalt acetate in 100 ml of methanol and 0.2 ml of glacial acetic acid).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرتين من الكاشف 7A (أذب 0.1 غرام من أسيتات الكوبالت في 100 مل من الميثانول و 0.2 مل من حمض الأسيتيك الجليدي).

testInstructions.instruction: Add 2 drops of reagent 7B (Mix 5 ml of isopropylamine and 95 ml of methanol).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرتين من الكاشف 7B (امزج 5 مل من إيزوبروبيل أمين و 95 مل من الميثانول).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe for a reddish-purple color.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ وجود لون أرجواني مائل للأحمر.

references: Koppanyi, T., Dille, J.M., Murphy, W.S., Krop, S.. Pharm.Assoc., 23 (1934) 1074

handlingProcedures: Work in a fume hood due to methanol and isopropylamine vapors.
Avoid inhalation and skin contact.
Ensure reagents are freshly prepared if possible.
specificHazards: Isopropylamine is highly flammable and irritating.
Methanol is toxic if inhaled or ingested.
Cobalt salts are suspected carcinogens.
storageRequirements: Store in flammables cabinet.
Keep reagents tightly sealed.

gallic_acid_test.description: For reagent-based analysis of MDA/MDMA derivatives
gallic_acid_test.description_ar: للتحليل الكاشف لـ مشتقات إم دي إيه/إم دي إم إيه

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the substance on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of gallic acid solution.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من محلول حمض الغاليك.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of concentrated sulfuric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض الكبريتيك المركز.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change to green.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون إلى الأخضر.

references: World Health Organization - Programme on Substance Abuse. Information Manual on Designer Drugs. WHO/PSA/90.5, Geneva (1991)

handlingProcedures: Handle concentrated sulfuric acid with extreme care.
Use minimum amounts of reagents.
Carry out the test on a spot plate in a fume hood.
specificHazards: Severe burn hazard from concentrated sulfuric acid.
Potential for heat-generating reactions.
storageRequirements: Store in an acid-safe cabinet.
Keep away from water and organic solvents.

vitali_morin.description: Identification of diazepam and related benzodiazepines

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of fuming nitric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض النيتريك المدخن.

testInstructions.instruction: Evaporate to dryness carefully.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: بخر حتى الجفاف بعناية.

testInstructions.instruction: Dissolve the residue in acetone.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أذب الراسب في الأسيتون.

testInstructions.instruction: Add a few drops of 10% alcoholic potassium hydroxide.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف بضع قطرات من هيدروكسيد البوتاسيوم الكحولي بنسبة 10%.

references: Kovar, K.-A., Laudszun, M.. Chemistry and Reaction Mechanisms of Rapid Tests for Drugs of Abuse and Precursor Chemicals. United Nations - Scientific and Technical Notes, SCITEC/6, Vienna (1989), p. 14

handlingProcedures: Perform evaporation step carefully in a fume hood.
Avoid inhaling fuming nitric acid vapors.
Wear eye protection at all times during the procedure.
specificHazards: Corrosive nature of fuming nitric acid and KOH solution.
Flammability of acetone.
Nitrogen oxide emissions during evaporation.
storageRequirements: Store nitric acid in an acid cabinet.
Keep acetone in a flammables cabinet.

sulfuric_acid_test.description: Preliminary color test for various alkaloids

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of concentrated sulfuric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض الكبريتيك المركز.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe color change immediately.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون فورًا.

references: Nenninger, H.. Sci.Pharm., 55 (1987) 1

handlingProcedures: Handle concentrated sulfuric acid with extreme care.
Place smallest possible drop on sample.
Discard plate contents carefully after neutralizing.
specificHazards: Concentrated sulfuric acid causes severe, immediate chemical burns.
Violent splattering if water is added to the acid.
storageRequirements: Store in a dedicated acid cabinet.
Separate from metal powders and oxidizing agents.

hydrochloric_acid_test.description: Test for cocaine and specific alkaloids

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the sample in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of concentrated hydrochloric acid.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من حمض الهيدروكلوريك المركز.

testInstructions.instruction: Observe reactions and odor.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ التفاعلات والرائحة.

references: Kovar, K.-A., Linden, D.. Pharm.Acta Helv., 58 (1983) 66

handlingProcedures: Handle concentrated acid only in a fume hood.
Be careful not to inhale fuming HCl vapors.
Wear eye protection at all times.
specificHazards: Hydrochloric acid is highly corrosive.
HCl vapors are irritating and can cause lung damage if inhaled in large amounts.
storageRequirements: Store in a ventilated cabinet for corrosives.
Separate from oxidizing agents.

froehde_test.description: Selective test for opioids and alkaloids

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the sample on a spot plate.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من العينة على لوحة البقع.

testInstructions.instruction: Add one drop of Froehde reagent (Dissolve 0.5 g of ammonium molybdate in 100 ml of concentrated sulfuric acid).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرة واحدة من كاشف فرويد (أذب 0.5 غرام من موليبدات الأمونيوم في 100 مل من حمض الكبريتيك المركز).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe color changes over 1-2 minutes.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغيرات اللون خلال 1-2 دقيقة.

references: Moffat, A.C. (Editor). Clarke's Isolation and Identification of Drugs. The Pharmaceutical Press, London (1986)

handlingProcedures: Prepare reagent by adding acid to ammonium molybdate slowly.
Mix thoroughly in a well-ventilated area.
Wear full protective gear.
specificHazards: Molybdenum compounds are toxic.
Corrosive hazards from concentrated sulfuric acid.
storageRequirements: Store in a secure cabinet for toxic and corrosive substances.
Keep tightly sealed.

testInstructions.instruction: Place a small amount of the substance in a test tube.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: ضع كمية صغيرة من المادة في أنبوب اختبار.

testInstructions.instruction: Add 2 drops of reagent 11A (Dissolve 0.5 g of copper(II) sulfate pentahydrate in 100 ml of water).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرتين من الكاشف 11A (أذب 0.5 غرام من كبريتات النحاس (II) خماسي الهيدرات في 100 مل من الماء).

testInstructions.instruction: Add 2 drops of reagent 11B (Pyridine).
testInstructions.instruction_ar: أضف قطرتين من الكاشف 11B (بيريدين).

testInstructions.instruction: Observe the color change to light blue-violet.
testInstructions.instruction_ar: لاحظ تغير اللون إلى البنفسجي المزرق الفاتح.

references: Kovar, K.-A., Laudszun, M.. Chemistry and Reaction Mechanisms of Rapid Tests for Drugs of Abuse and Precursor Chemicals. United Nations - Scientific and Technical Notes, SCITEC/6, Vienna (1989), p. 11

handlingProcedures: Handle pyridine inside a fume hood due to its strong, unpleasant odor.
Avoid ingestion of copper sulfate reagent.
Dispose of waste responsibly.
specificHazards: Pyridine is flammable and toxic.
Copper salts are harmful to health and the environment.
storageRequirements: Store reagents separately in cool, dry areas.
Pyridine: keep in flammables cabinet.
